source:
# Import required libraries
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from delta.tables import DeltaTable

# Parameters
customer = 'cwit'  # Can be parameterized
base_path = f"abfss://{customer}@navispowerbidatastorage2.dfs.core.windows.net"

# 1. LOAD MOVE HISTORY DATA FROM SILVER LAYER
# ============================================
moves_df = spark.read \
    .format("delta") \
    .load(f"{base_path}/silver/moves")

# Display schema and sample data
# print("Original Data Schema:")
# moves_df.printSchema()
# print(f"Total records: {moves_df.count()}")
# display(moves_df.limit(5))

# 2. FILTER FOR RTG MOVES WITH VALID mve_gkey AND t_put
# ======================================================
rtg_moves_df = moves_df.filter(
    (F.col("mve_gkey").isNotNull()) & 
    (F.col("t_put").isNotNull()) &  # Only include records with valid t_put
    (
        (F.col("Fetch_CHE_Kind") == "RTG") | 
        (F.col("Carry_CHE_Kind") == "RTG") | 
        (F.col("Put_CHE_Kind") == "RTG")
    )
)

# print(f"RTG moves with valid mve_gkey and t_put: {rtg_moves_df.count()}")

# 4. ADD Move_Kind_Actual COLUMN - SIMPLIFIED LOGIC
# =================================================
rtg_moves_with_actual = rtg_moves_df.withColumn(
    "from_has_q", has_q_start(F.col("From_Position_Name"))
).withColumn(
    "from_has_w", has_w(F.col("From_Position_Name"))
).withColumn(
    "to_has_w", has_w(F.col("To_Position_Name"))
).withColumn(
    "to_has_q", has_q_start(F.col("To_Position_Name"))
).withColumn(
    "Move_Kind_Actual",
    F.when(
        # Keep original LOAD as is
        (F.col("Move_Kind") == "LOAD"),
        "LOAD"
    ).when(
        # YARD move from Q position to W position = DSCH
        (F.col("Move_Kind") == "YARD") & 
        (F.col("from_has_w") == True) & 
        (F.col("to_has_w") == False) &
        (F.col("to_has_q") == False),
        "DSCH"
    ).when(
        # YARD move from Q position to W position = DSCH
        (F.col("Move_Kind") == "YARD") & 
        (F.col("Put_CHE_Kind") == "RTG") &
        (F.col("from_has_q") == True) & 
        (F.col("to_has_w") == False),
        "DSCH"    
    ).when(
        # YARD move from W position = DSCH_SECONDARY
        (F.col("Move_Kind") == "YARD") & 
        (F.col("from_has_q") == True) &
        (F.col("to_has_w") == True),
        "YARD_DSCH"
    ).when(
        # YARD move to W position (and not from Q) = LOAD_PREPARATORY
        (F.col("Move_Kind") == "YARD") & 
        (F.col("to_has_w") == True) & 
        (F.col("from_has_q") == False),
        "YARD_LOAD"
    ).when(
        # All other YARD moves
        (F.col("Move_Kind") == "YARD"),
        "YARD"
    ).otherwise(F.col("Move_Kind"))  # Keep original for all other move types
)

# Drop helper columns
rtg_moves_with_actual = rtg_moves_with_actual.drop("from_has_q", "from_has_w", "to_has_w","to_has_q")

# Add move_date based on t_put
rtg_moves_with_actual = rtg_moves_with_actual.withColumn(
    "move_date", F.to_date("t_put")

# 5. OPTIMIZED ACTIVE TIME CALCULATION PER CHE PER DAY
# =====================================================
# Cache the main dataframe for better performance
rtg_moves_with_actual.cache()

# Create a more efficient single dataframe for all CHE moves
che_moves_list = []

# Collect Fetch CHE moves
if "Fetch_CHE_Id" in rtg_moves_with_actual.columns:
    fetch_che = rtg_moves_with_actual.filter(
        (F.col("Fetch_CHE_Kind") == "RTG") & F.col("Fetch_CHE_Id").isNotNull()
    ).select(
        "mve_gkey",
        F.col("Fetch_CHE_Id").alias("CHE_Id"),
        "t_put",
        "move_date",
        F.lit("fetch").alias("che_type")
    )
    che_moves_list.append(fetch_che)

# Collect Carry CHE moves
if "Carry_CHE_Id" in rtg_moves_with_actual.columns:
    carry_che = rtg_moves_with_actual.filter(
        (F.col("Carry_CHE_Kind") == "RTG") & F.col("Carry_CHE_Id").isNotNull()
    ).select(
        "mve_gkey",
        F.col("Carry_CHE_Id").alias("CHE_Id"),
        "t_put",
        "move_date",
        F.lit("carry").alias("che_type")
    )
    che_moves_list.append(carry_che)

# Collect Put CHE moves
if "Put_CHE_Id" in rtg_moves_with_actual.columns:
    put_che = rtg_moves_with_actual.filter(
        (F.col("Put_CHE_Kind") == "RTG") & F.col("Put_CHE_Id").isNotNull()
    ).select(
        "mve_gkey",
        F.col("Put_CHE_Id").alias("CHE_Id"),
        "t_put",
        "move_date",
        F.lit("put").alias("che_type")
    )
    che_moves_list.append(put_che)

# Union all CHE moves if we have any
if che_moves_list:
    all_che_moves = che_moves_list[0]
    for df in che_moves_list[1:]:
        all_che_moves = all_che_moves.union(df)
    all_che_moves = all_che_moves.distinct()
else:
    # If no CHE moves found, create empty dataframe with proper schema
    all_che_moves = spark.createDataFrame([], schema="mve_gkey string, CHE_Id long, t_put timestamp, move_date date, che_type string")

# Calculate sessions with 3-hour gap - optimized with single window operation
if all_che_moves.count() > 0:
    che_day_window = Window.partitionBy("CHE_Id", "move_date").orderBy("t_put")
    
    che_sessions = all_che_moves.withColumn(
        "prev_move_time", F.lag("t_put").over(che_day_window)
    ).withColumn(
        "moves_gap_seconds",
        F.when(F.col("prev_move_time").isNotNull(),
               (F.unix_timestamp("t_put") - F.unix_timestamp("prev_move_time")))
        .otherwise(None)
    ).withColumn(
        "new_session_flag",
        F.when(
            F.col("prev_move_time").isNull() | (F.col("moves_gap_seconds") > 10800),
            1
        ).otherwise(0)
    ).withColumn(
        "session_id",
        F.sum("new_session_flag").over(
            Window.partitionBy("CHE_Id", "move_date")
                  .orderBy("t_put")
                  .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
        )
    )
    
    # Calculate session metrics
    session_metrics = che_sessions.groupBy("CHE_Id", "move_date", "session_id").agg(
        F.min("t_put").alias("session_start"),
        F.max("t_put").alias("session_end"),
        F.count("mve_gkey").alias("moves_in_session")
    ).withColumn(
        "session_worktime_seconds",
        F.when(
            F.col("moves_in_session") == 1,
            3600  # 1 hour in seconds
        ).otherwise(
            F.unix_timestamp("session_end") - F.unix_timestamp("session_start")
        )
    ).withColumn(
        "session_worktime_hours",
        F.col("session_worktime_seconds") / 3600.0
    )
    
    # Join back and calculate per-move active time
    che_with_active_time = che_sessions.join(
        session_metrics.select("CHE_Id", "move_date", "session_id", "session_worktime_seconds"),
        on=["CHE_Id", "move_date", "session_id"],
        how="left"
    ).withColumn(
        "move_active_time_seconds",
        F.col("session_worktime_seconds") / F.count("*").over(
            Window.partitionBy("CHE_Id", "move_date", "session_id")
        )
    )
    
    # Pivot to get active time for each CHE type - more efficient than multiple joins
    active_time_pivot = che_with_active_time.groupBy("mve_gkey").pivot("che_type", ["fetch", "carry", "put"]).agg(
        F.first("move_active_time_seconds").alias("active_time_seconds"),
        F.first("session_id").alias("session_id")
    ).fillna(0)  # Fill nulls with 0
    
    # Rename pivoted columns
    for che_type in ["fetch", "carry", "put"]:
        active_time_pivot = active_time_pivot \
            .withColumnRenamed(f"{che_type}_active_time_seconds", f"{che_type}_active_time_seconds") \
            .withColumnRenamed(f"{che_type}_session_id", f"{che_type}_session_id")
    
else:
    # Create empty active time dataframe if no CHE moves
    active_time_pivot = spark.createDataFrame([], schema="mve_gkey string")
    for che_type in ["fetch", "carry", "put"]:
        active_time_pivot = active_time_pivot \
            .withColumn(f"{che_type}_active_time_seconds", F.lit(None).cast("double")) \
            .withColumn(f"{che_type}_session_id", F.lit(None).cast("long"))

# 6. JOIN ACTIVE TIME BACK TO MAIN DATAFRAME
# ===========================================

if active_time_pivot.count() > 0:
    final_output = rtg_moves_with_actual.join(
        active_time_pivot,
        on="mve_gkey",
        how="left"
    )
else:
    # If no active time data, just add empty columns
    final_output = rtg_moves_with_actual
    for che_type in ["fetch", "carry", "put"]:
        final_output = final_output \
            .withColumn(f"{che_type}_active_time_seconds", F.lit(None).cast("double")) \
            .withColumn(f"{che_type}_session_id", F.lit(None).cast("long"))

# Add calculated columns
final_output = final_output.withColumn(
    "active_time_seconds",
    F.greatest(
        F.coalesce(F.col("fetch_active_time_seconds"), F.lit(0)),
        F.coalesce(F.col("carry_active_time_seconds"), F.lit(0)),
        F.coalesce(F.col("put_active_time_seconds"), F.lit(0))
    )
).withColumn(
    "active_time_hours",
    F.col("active_time_seconds") / 3600.0
).withColumn(
    "is_productive_move",
    F.when(
        F.col("Move_Kind_Actual").isin([
            "DSCH", "LOAD", "RECV", "DLVR", "SHFT"
        ]),
        1
    ).otherwise(0)
)

# Unpersist cached dataframe
rtg_moves_with_actual.unpersist()

output_path = f"{base_path}/gold/rtg_productivity_enhanced"

# Select final columns in organized order
final_columns = [
    # Original identifiers
    "mve_gkey",
    "Unit_Nbr",
    "Facility_Id",
    "Complex_Id",
    "Yard_Id",
    "Carrier_Visit_Key",
    
    # Movement information
    "Event_Type_Id",
    "Move_Kind",
    "Move_Kind_Actual",  # NEW COLUMN
    
    # Location information
    "From_Location",
    "To_Location",
    "From_Position_Name",
    "To_Position_Name",
    
    # CHE Information
    "Fetch_CHE_Id",
    "Fetch_CHE_Kind",
    "Fetch_CHE_Operator_Id",
    "Carry_CHE_Id",
    "Carry_CHE_Kind",
    "Carry_CHE_Operator_Id",
    "Put_CHE_Id",
    "Put_CHE_Kind",
    "Put_CHE_Operator_Id",
    "QC_CHE_Id",
    "QC_CHE_Kind",
    
    # Main timing column
    "t_put",
    
    # Other timing columns
    "t_carry_complete",
    "t_fetch",
    "t_dispatch",
    "t_discharge",
    "t_carry_dispatch",
    "t_carry_fetch_ready",
    "t_carry_put_ready",
    
    # Active time columns (NEW)
    "fetch_session_id",
    "carry_session_id",
    "put_session_id",
    "fetch_active_time_seconds",
    "carry_active_time_seconds",
    "put_active_time_seconds",
    "active_time_seconds",  # NEW COLUMN - maximum of all CHE active times
    "active_time_hours",  # NEW COLUMN - in hours
    
    # Other columns
    "dist_carry",
    "dist_start",
    "Twin_Fetch",
    "Twin_Carry",
    "Twin_Put",
    "Category_Id",
    "Freight_Kind_Id",
    "to_pos_gkey",
    "fm_pos_gkey",
    "Restow_Reason",
    "Container_Line_Id",
    "Container_Line_Role",
    "pow",
    "ufv_gkey",
    "Berth_Id",
    "Goods_And_Ctr_Wt_Kg",
    "active_ufv",
    "Requires_Power_Flag",
    "OOG_Flag",
    "Shipper_Id",
    "Consignee_Id",
    "Commodity_Id",
    "ATD",
    "Rehandles",
    "ATA",
    
    # Calculated/helper columns
    "move_date",
    "is_productive_move",
    
    # Time dimensions
    "Year",
    "Month",
    "Week"
]

# Check which columns exist and filter
existing_columns = final_output.columns
final_columns_filtered = [col for col in final_columns if col in existing_columns]

# Check for missing columns
missing_columns = set(final_columns) - set(existing_columns)
if missing_columns:
    print(f"Warning: Missing columns that won't be included: {missing_columns}")

# Select only existing columns
final_output_clean = final_output.select(*final_columns_filtered)

# Add processing timestamp for tracking
final_output_clean = final_output_clean.withColumn("last_updated", F.current_timestamp())

# 7. SAVE TO GOLD LAYER
# =====================
try:
    # Check if table exists
    if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, output_path):
        print(f"Table exists at {output_path}. Performing merge/upsert...")
        
        # Load existing Delta table
        deltaTable = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, output_path)
        
        # Perform merge - update existing records, insert new ones
        merge_result = deltaTable.alias("target") \
            .merge(
                final_output_clean.alias("source"),
                "target.mve_gkey = source.mve_gkey"  # Match on mve_gkey
            ) \
            .whenMatchedUpdateAll() \
            .whenNotMatchedInsertAll() \
            .execute()
        
        print("Merge/upsert completed successfully")
        
        # Get merge statistics
        history = deltaTable.history(1).collect()[0]
        if 'operationMetrics' in history:
            metrics = history['operationMetrics']
            print(f"Rows updated: {metrics.get('numTargetRowsUpdated', 0)}")
            print(f"Rows inserted: {metrics.get('numTargetRowsInserted', 0)}")
        
    else:
        # Table doesn't exist, create it for the first time
        print(f"Creating new table at {output_path}")
        
        final_output_clean.write \
            .mode("overwrite") \
            .format("delta") \
            .option("overwriteSchema", "true") \
            .partitionBy("Year", "Month") \
            .save(output_path)
        
        print("Initial table creation completed")
        
    # Optimize the table after write
    deltaTable = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, output_path)
    deltaTable.optimize().executeCompaction()
    print("Table optimization completed")
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error during merge/write: {str(e)}")
    print("Falling back to append mode...")
    
    # Fallback to append if merge fails
    final_output_clean.write \
        .mode("append") \
        .format("delta") \
        .partitionBy("Year", "Month") \
        .save(output_path)
    
    print("Data appended successfully")

print(f"Data saved to: {output_path}")

# 8. DISPLAY SUMMARY AND VALIDATION
# ==================================
print("\n=== RTG PRODUCTIVITY SUMMARY ===\n")

# Check Move_Kind_Actual distribution
move_distribution = final_output_clean.groupBy("Move_Kind", "Move_Kind_Actual").count().orderBy("Move_Kind", "Move_Kind_Actual")
print("Move Kind vs Move_Kind_Actual Distribution:")
display(move_distribution)

# Daily productivity summary
print("\nDaily RTG Productivity Summary:")
daily_productivity = final_output_clean.groupBy("move_date").agg(
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "DSCH", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("DSCH_Moves"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "LOAD", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("LOAD_Moves"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "YARD", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Regular_Yard"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "YARD_DSCH", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Yard_DSCH"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "YARD_LOAD", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Yard_LOAD"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("is_productive_move") == 1, 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Total_Productive"),
    F.countDistinct("Fetch_CHE_Id", "Carry_CHE_Id", "Put_CHE_Id").alias("RTGs_Used")
).orderBy("move_date")
display(daily_productivity.limit(20))

# Verify active time calculation
print("\nSample Data with Active Time:")
time_sample = final_output_clean.filter(
    F.col("active_time_seconds").isNotNull() & (F.col("active_time_seconds") > 0)
).select(
    "mve_gkey",
    "Unit_Nbr",
    "Move_Kind",
    "Move_Kind_Actual",
    "From_Position_Name",
    "To_Position_Name",
    "Fetch_CHE_Id",
    "Put_CHE_Id",
    "t_put",
    "fetch_active_time_seconds",
    "carry_active_time_seconds",
    "put_active_time_seconds",
    "active_time_seconds"
).limit(20)
display(time_sample)

# Summary statistics
print("\nOverall Statistics:")
stats = final_output_clean.agg(
    F.count("*").alias("Total_Moves"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "DSCH", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Total_DSCH"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "LOAD", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Total_LOAD"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "YARD_DSCH", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Total_YARD_DSCH"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "YARD_LOAD", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Total_YARD_LOAD"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Move_Kind_Actual") == "YARD", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Total_Regular_Yard"),
    F.avg("active_time_seconds").alias("Avg_Active_Time_Seconds")
).collect()[0]

print(f"""
Total RTG Moves: {stats['Total_Moves']}
DSCH Operations: {stats['Total_DSCH']}
LOAD Operations: {stats['Total_LOAD']}
YARD DSCH Operations: {stats['Total_YARD_DSCH']}
YARD LOAD Operations: {stats['Total_YARD_LOAD']}
Regular Yard Moves: {stats['Total_Regular_Yard']}
Avg Active Time per Move: {stats['Avg_Active_Time_Seconds']:.2f} seconds
""")

# 9. CREATE AGGREGATED PRODUCTIVITY TABLE
# ========================================
print("\n=== CREATING AGGREGATED PRODUCTIVITY TABLE ===\n")

# First, add CHE_Id column and Shift information
final_output_with_che = final_output_clean.withColumn(
    "CHE_Id",
    F.coalesce(
        F.when(F.col("Fetch_CHE_Kind") == "RTG", F.col("Fetch_CHE_Id")),
        F.when(F.col("Carry_CHE_Kind") == "RTG", F.col("Carry_CHE_Id")),
        F.when(F.col("Put_CHE_Kind") == "RTG", F.col("Put_CHE_Id"))
    )
).withColumn(
    "Has_Multiple_RTGs",
    F.when(
        (F.col("Fetch_CHE_Id") != F.col("Carry_CHE_Id")) |
        (F.col("Carry_CHE_Id") != F.col("Put_CHE_Id")) |
        (F.col("Fetch_CHE_Id") != F.col("Put_CHE_Id")),
        True
    ).otherwise(False)
).withColumn(
    "Hour",
    F.hour("t_put")
).withColumn(
    "Shift",
    F.when(
        (F.col("Hour") >= 7) & (F.col("Hour") < 19),
        "Day"
    ).otherwise("Night")
).withColumn(
    "Shift_Date",
    F.when(
        (F.col("Shift") == "Night") & (F.col("Hour") < 7),
        F.date_sub(F.col("move_date"), 1)
    ).otherwise(F.col("move_date"))
)

# Filter out rows where CHE_Id is null
final_with_che_filtered = final_output_with_che.filter(F.col("CHE_Id").isNotNull())

# Step 1: Calculate Shift-level metrics (CHE + Date + Shift)
shift_level_metrics = final_with_che_filtered.groupBy(
    "CHE_Id", 
    "Shift_Date",
    "Shift"
).agg(
    F.round(F.sum("active_time_hours"), 2).alias("Active_Hours"),
    F.min("t_put").alias("Shift_Start_Time"),
    F.max("t_put").alias("Shift_End_Time"),
    F.count("mve_gkey").alias("Total_Shift_Moves")
).withColumn(
    "Shift_Duration_Hours",
    F.round(
        (F.unix_timestamp("Shift_End_Time") - F.unix_timestamp("Shift_Start_Time")) / 3600,
        2
    )
).withColumn(
    "Shift_Duration_Hours",
    F.when(F.col("Shift_Duration_Hours") <= 0, F.col("Active_Hours"))
     .otherwise(F.col("Shift_Duration_Hours"))
).withColumn(
    "Utilization_Rate",
    F.when(F.col("Shift_Duration_Hours") > 0,
           F.round((F.col("Active_Hours") / F.col("Shift_Duration_Hours")) * 100, 1)
    ).otherwise(None)
)

# Step 2: Aggregate by CHE + Date + Shift + Move_Kind_Actual (for move counts)
move_kind_metrics = final_with_che_filtered.groupBy(
    "CHE_Id", 
    "Shift_Date",
    "Shift",
    "Move_Kind_Actual"
).agg(
    F.count("mve_gkey").alias("Move_Count"),
    F.sum("is_productive_move").alias("Productive_Move_Count"),
    F.countDistinct("Unit_Nbr").alias("Unique_Containers"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("Has_Multiple_RTGs") == True, 1).otherwise(0)).alias("Multi_RTG_Moves")
)

# Step 3: Join shift-level metrics to move_kind-level metrics
aggregated_final = move_kind_metrics.join(
    shift_level_metrics,
    on=["CHE_Id", "Shift_Date", "Shift"],
    how="left"
).withColumn(
    # Moves per hour for this move type (using shift active hours)
    "Moves_Per_Hour",
    F.when(F.col("Active_Hours") > 0,
           F.round(F.col("Move_Count") / F.col("Active_Hours"), 1)
    ).otherwise(None)
).withColumn(
    # Percentage of shift moves for this move type
    "Percent_of_Shift_Moves",
    F.when(F.col("Total_Shift_Moves") > 0,
           F.round((F.col("Move_Count") / F.col("Total_Shift_Moves")) * 100, 1)
    ).otherwise(None)
).withColumn(
    "last_updated", 
    F.current_timestamp()
).withColumn(
    "Year", F.year("Shift_Date")
).withColumn(
    "Month", F.month("Shift_Date")
).withColumn(
    "Week", F.weekofyear("Shift_Date")
).withColumn(
    "DayOfWeek", F.dayofweek("Shift_Date")
)

# Rename Shift_Date to move_date
aggregated_final = aggregated_final.withColumnRenamed("Shift_Date", "move_date")

# Sort the data
aggregated_final = aggregated_final.orderBy("move_date", "Shift", "CHE_Id", "Move_Kind_Actual")

# # Display sample
# print("Sample of aggregated data:")
# display(aggregated_final.limit(20))


#

# 10. SAVE AGGREGATED TABLE TO GOLD LAYER
# ========================================
agg_output_path = f"{base_path}/gold/rtg_productivity_summary"

try:
    if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, agg_output_path):
        print(f"Aggregated table exists at {agg_output_path}. Performing merge...")
        
        deltaTable = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, agg_output_path)
        
        # Merge on CHE_Id + move_date + Shift + Move_Kind_Actual
        deltaTable.alias("target") \
            .merge(
                aggregated_final.alias("source"),
                """
                target.CHE_Id = source.CHE_Id AND 
                target.move_date = source.move_date AND 
                target.Shift = source.Shift AND
                target.Move_Kind_Actual = source.Move_Kind_Actual
                """
            ) \
            .whenMatchedUpdateAll() \
            .whenNotMatchedInsertAll() \
            .execute()
        
        print("Merge completed")
        
    else:
        print(f"Creating new table at {agg_output_path}")
        
        aggregated_final.write \
            .mode("overwrite") \
            .format("delta") \
            .option("overwriteSchema", "true") \
            .partitionBy("Year", "Month") \
            .save(agg_output_path)
        
        print("Table created")
    
    # Optimize
    deltaTable = DeltaTable.forPath(spark, agg_output_path)
    deltaTable.optimize().executeCompaction()
    print("Table optimized")
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {str(e)}")
    aggregated_final.write \
        .mode("overwrite") \
        .format("delta") \
        .option("overwriteSchema", "true") \
        .partitionBy("Year", "Month") \
        .save(agg_output_path)

print(f"\nData saved to: {agg_output_path}")
